introduction: Two large standing stones, intricately carved with ancient symbols and pictographs.
The carvings depict what appears to be a great battle - warriors standing against shadowy figures emerging from a portal.
At the base of one stone, you notice the words '...sealed by the Seven... until the stars align...' The other stone shows a towering structure - perhaps this very ruin in its original glory.

As you study the worn symbols more closely, understanding dawns. This place was once a watchtower - built to guard against something from beyond. The portal inside was meant to be a prison, not a gateway.
But someone has been reactivating it. Whatever was sealed here was never meant to return.
